message:
fix: Register user project files in VFS dir index when using baseDirIndex

The WASI dir index was cloned from stdlibDirIndex which only contained
stdlib files. User project files (app/main.py etc.) added to the files
dict weren't registered in the directory index, making them invisible
to Python's importlib (fd_readdir couldn't find them).

Now after cloning the base index, iterate extra files and register them.
This fixes "No module named 'main'" when running through PythonDO.
